---
title: "Survey_Report"
---
# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for Survey data

# Use modelled means

``` {r BasicStats}
### Limit data to March through June samples to reduce seasonal bias
ShellHeights_1 <- ShellHeights_ALL %>%
  filter(month(TripDate) > 02 & month(TripDate) < 07)

Quadrats_1 <- Quadrats_ALL %>%
  filter(month(TripDate) > 02 & month(TripDate) < 07)

### Provides how many were measured for each size class for each quadrat
SHMeasures <- ShellHeights_1 %>%
  group_by(QuadratID) %>%
  summarize(TotalNumMeasured = sum(!is.na(ShellHeight)),
            Count_Spat_1_to_30 = sum(ifelse(ShellHeight >= 1 & ShellHeight <= 30, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
            Count_Seed_31_to_75 = sum(ifelse(ShellHeight >= 31 & ShellHeight <= 75, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
            Count_Legal_76_plus = sum(ifelse(ShellHeight >= 76, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

### Provide stats for how many live oysters there were in each quadrat, by size class
QuadStats <- left_join(Quadrats_1, SHMeasures, by = c("QuadratID")) %>%
  mutate(
    Num_Spat_1_to_30 = if_else(TotalNumMeasured == 0, 0, (Count_Spat_1_to_30 * NumLive) / TotalNumMeasured),
    Num_Seed_31_to_75 = if_else(TotalNumMeasured == 0, 0, (Count_Seed_31_to_75 * NumLive) / TotalNumMeasured),
    Num_Legal_76_plus = if_else(TotalNumMeasured == 0, 0, (Count_Legal_76_plus * NumLive) / TotalNumMeasured)) %>%
  select(-starts_with("Count_")) # Remove Count columns as they are no longer needed

# remove intermediate data frames
# rm(ShellHeights_ALL, ShellHeights_1, Quadrats_ALL, Quadrats_1)



# Prep data frame for creating SH distribution histogram for ALL Years
SizeClasses_ALL <- ShellHeights_1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(ShellHeight)) %>%
  mutate(ShellHeightBin = cut(ShellHeight, 
                              breaks = c(0, 30, 75, 200),
                              right = TRUE,
                              include.lowest = TRUE)) %>% # puts measures in 3 bins
  group_by(Year, ProjectGroup) %>%
  mutate(ProjectTotal = n()) %>%
  group_by(ProjectGroup, Year, ShellHeightBin, ProjectTotal) %>%
  summarise(ProjectNumberMeasured = n()) %>%
  mutate(ProportionMeasured = (ProjectNumberMeasured / ProjectTotal),
         Year = factor(Year),
         ShellHeightBin = factor(ShellHeightBin,
                                 levels = c("(75,200]", "(30,75]", "[0,30]" )   # <-- order from bottom to top
    ))

SizeClasses_ALL$ShellHeightBin <- forcats::fct_recode(SizeClasses_ALL$ShellHeightBin,
  "Spat (1–30 mm)"    = "[0,30]",
  "Seed (31–75 mm)"   = "(30,75]",
  "Legal (>=76 mm)"  = "(75,200]"
)

maxSH <- max(ShellHeights_1$ShellHeight, na.rm = TRUE)




# Prep data frame for creating SH distribution histogram for PROJECT YEAR
ShellHeightsReportYrX <- ShellHeights_1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(ShellHeight),
  Year == ReportYear) %>%

  mutate(ShellHeightBin = cut(ShellHeight, 
                              breaks = seq(0, ceiling(max(ShellHeight, na.rm = TRUE)) + 5, by = 5),
                              right = TRUE,
                              include.lowest = TRUE)) %>% # puts measures in 5 mm bins
  group_by(ProjectGroup) %>%
  mutate(ProjectTotal = n()) %>%
  group_by(ProjectGroup, ShellHeightBin, ProjectTotal) %>%
  summarise(ProjectNumberMeasured = n()) %>%
  mutate(PercentMeasured = (ProjectNumberMeasured / ProjectTotal) * 100)

ShellHeightsReportYr <- ShellHeights_1 %>%
  filter(Year == ReportYear) 

maxSH <- max(ShellHeightsReportYr$ShellHeight, na.rm = TRUE)

```

``` {r SampleWeightStats}
# Analysis indicates that Historic and Restoration data should be modeled separately

# Figure out which data distribution to use
# Historic
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")$TotalWeight)
# NFWF-2021
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")$TotalWeight) 

### Historic Model ###
# Gamma out performed Gaussian
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model
TotalWeight_Historic <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"), 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(TotalWeight_Historic, n = 1000, plot = T)

### Restoration Model ###
## NFWF-2021 ##
# Gaussian out performed Gamma
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model

TotalWeight_NFWF2021 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                      family = gaussian(link = "identity"), 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(TotalWeight_NFWF2021, n = 1000, plot = T)

# Look at summaries
summary(TotalWeight_Historic)
summary(TotalWeight_NFWF2021)

# Create dataframe to store 
####### Put the modeled means into a data frame for plotting
TotalWeightStats_historic <- emmeans(TotalWeight_Historic, ~ Year, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "Historic Uncultched") 

TotalWeightStats_nfwf2021 <- emmeans(TotalWeight_NFWF2021, ~ Year, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "NFWF-2021") %>%
  rename(response = emmean, # rename due to gaussian family
         asymp.LCL = lower.CL,
         asymp.UCL = upper.CL)

TotalWeightStats_modeled <- bind_rows(TotalWeightStats_historic, TotalWeightStats_nfwf2021) %>%
  rename(TotalWeightMean_modeled = response,
         TotalWeightLower_modeled = asymp.LCL,
         TotalWeightUpper_modeled = asymp.UCL) %>%
  mutate(TotalWeightMeanDensity_modeled = round((TotalWeightMean_modeled * 4), 1),
         TotalWeightLowerDensity_modeled = round((TotalWeightLower_modeled * 4), 1),
         TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled = round((TotalWeightUpper_modeled * 4), 1)) %>%
  select(-SE, -df) %>%
  mutate(TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled = case_when(
    TotalWeightMean_modeled <= 0 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled
  ))

# Generate raw mean and SD
TotalWeightStats_RAW <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup) %>%
  summarise_ALL() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup) %>%
  select(-matches("Num"))

TotalWeightStats_ALL <- left_join(TotalWeightStats_modeled, 
                              TotalWeightStats_RAW, 
                              by = c("Year", "ProjectGroup")) 

#  # Create a complete grid for all years, sections, and projects
# df_complete <- expand_grid(Year = Years_Survey, SectionName = lv3, ProjectGroup = unique(NumLiveStats_ALL$ProjectGroup)) %>%
#     left_join(NumLiveStats_ALL, by = c("Year", "SectionName", "ProjectGroup")) %>% 
#     mutate(has_data = !is.na(RawOysterDensityMean), # Add a flag for missing data
#            SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))






```


``` {r TotalWeight Figures}

# Bar graph for modeled mean Total Weight density by ProjectGroup and Year

### HISTORIC ###
# Needed for Null data symbol
# df_historic <- df_complete %>%
#   filter(ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")

# TotalWeightStats_FIG_Historic <- TotalWeightStats_ALL %>%
#   filter(ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")  # limits to Historic Uncultched only
    
TotalWeightStats_FIGURE_ALL <- TotalWeightStats_ALL %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(Year), 
             y = TotalWeightMeanDensity_modeled,
             fill = as.factor(ProjectGroup))) + 
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = TotalWeightLowerDensity_modeled, 
                      ymax = TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled),
                      width = 0.3, 
                      position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + # Add error bars
      scale_x_discrete("Year", 
                       expand = c(0.005, 0), 
                       guide = guide_axis(angle = -45)) +
      scale_y_continuous("Mean Sample Weight Density (kg / m2)", 
                         expand = c(0, 0),
                         limits = c(0, ceiling(max(TotalWeightStats_ALL$TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE)) * 1.05),
                         breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 6)(c(0, ceiling(max(TotalWeightStats_ALL$TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE))))) + 
      ggtitle("Modeled Mean Sample Weight Density by Year and Project Group") + 
      BaseForm +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 0)) 

print(TotalWeightStats_FIGURE_ALL)



# Summary Table for the Appendix
TotalWeightStats_TABLE <- TotalWeightStats_ALL %>%
  select(ProjectGroup,
         Year, 
         TotalWeightDensityMean_raw,
         TotalWeightDensitySD_raw,
         TotalWeightMeanDensity_modeled,
         TotalWeightLowerDensity_modeled,
         TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled) %>%
  arrange(ProjectGroup,
          Year)
  
kable(TotalWeightStats_TABLE,
      digits = 1,
      col.names = c("Project", "Year", 
      "Raw Mean Density", "Raw SD",
      "Modeled Mean Density", "LCL 95%", "UCL 95%"),
      caption = "Raw and Modeled Mean Densities of Substrate. Density is expressed in kilogramss per square meter. SD = Standard Deviation. LCL = Lower Confidence Limit. UCL = Upper Confidence Limit. NA indicates that no samples were collected. ")

# Diagnostic Table for the Appendix
diag_TotalWeight_Historic <- extract_diagnostics(TotalWeight_Historic,  "Historic Uncultched")
diag_TotalWeight_NFWF2021 <- extract_diagnostics(TotalWeight_NFWF2021,  "NFWF-2021")

# Combine into a single Table
TotalWeight_Diagnostic_Table <- rbind(diag_TotalWeight_Historic, diag_TotalWeight_NFWF2021)
kable(TotalWeight_Diagnostic_Table)

```








``` {r NumLiveStats}
# Analysis indicates that Historic and Restoration data should be modeled separately

# Figure out which data distribution to use
# Historic
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")$NumLive)
# NFWF-2021
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")$NumLive)

### Historic Model ###
# Negative binomial out performed Poisson
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model
# Adding in extra nested structure to the random effects improved AIC and ultimately DHARMa, but keeping Section as a fixed effect was best
# Adding in dispformula = ~ SectionName improved fit, suggesting that variance is different between sections, but so are means. Preference for the simpler model meant leaving that out
NumLive_Historic <- glmmTMB(NumLive ~ factor(Year) * factor(SectionName) + (1 | FixedLocationID/QuadratID), 
                       family = nbinom2,   
                       data = QuadStats,
                       subset = ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")

# Compare all models
#aictab(list(NumLive_Historic,NumLive_Historic2))
# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(NumLive_Historic, n = 1000, plot = T)

### Restoration Model ###
## NFWF-2021 ##
# Negative binomial out performed Poisson
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was slightly detrimental to the model
# Adding nested random effects did not improve AIC, thus simpler is chosen, but keeping Section as a fixed effect was best
NumLive_NFWF2021 <- glmmTMB(NumLive ~ factor(Year) * factor(SectionName) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                       family = nbinom2,  
                       data = QuadStats,
                       subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(NumLive_NFWF2021, n = 1000, plot = T)

# Look at summaries
summary(NumLive_Historic)
summary(NumLive_NFWF2021)

# Create dataframe to store 
####### Put the modeled means into a data frame for plotting
NumLiveStats_historic <- emmeans(NumLive_Historic, ~ Year * SectionName, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "Historic Uncultched") 

NumLiveStats_nfwf2021 <- emmeans(NumLive_NFWF2021, ~ Year * SectionName, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "NFWF-2021")

NumLiveStats_modeled <- bind_rows(NumLiveStats_historic, NumLiveStats_nfwf2021) %>%
  rename(NumLiveMean_modeled = response,
         NumLiveLower_modeled = asymp.LCL,
         NumLiveUpper_modeled = asymp.UCL) %>%
  mutate(NumLiveMeanDensity_modeled = NumLiveMean_modeled * 4,
         NumLiveLowerDensity_modeled = NumLiveLower_modeled * 4,
         NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled = NumLiveUpper_modeled * 4) %>%
  select(-SE, -df) %>%
  mutate(NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled = case_when(
    NumLiveMean_modeled <= 0 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled
  ))

# Generate raw mean and SD
NumLiveStats_RAW <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup,
           SectionName) %>%
  summarise_ALL() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup) %>%
  select(-matches("Drill|Weight"))

NumLiveStats_ALL <- left_join(NumLiveStats_modeled, 
                              NumLiveStats_RAW, 
                              by = c("Year", "ProjectGroup", "SectionName")) %>%
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))
  
# rm(NumLiveStats_historic, NumLiveStats_RAW, NumLiveStats_RAW, NumLiveStats_RAW)

 # Create a complete grid for all years, sections, and projects
df_complete <- expand_grid(Year = Years_Survey, SectionName = lv3, ProjectGroup = unique(NumLiveStats_ALL$ProjectGroup)) %>%
    left_join(NumLiveStats_ALL, by = c("Year", "SectionName", "ProjectGroup")) %>% 
    mutate(has_data = !is.na(NumLiveDensityMean_raw), # Add a flag for missing data
           SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))
  
```

``` {r NumLive Figures}

# Bar graph for modeled mean oyster density by ProjectGroup, Year, and Section

### HISTORIC ###
# Needed for Null data symbol
df_historic <- df_complete %>%
  filter(ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched") %>%
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))

NumLiveStats_FIG_Historic <- NumLiveStats_ALL %>%
  filter(ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched") %>% # limits to Historic Uncultched only
    mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))

NumLiveStats_FIGURE_Historic <- NumLiveStats_FIG_Historic %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(Year), 
             y = NumLiveMeanDensity_modeled,
             fill = SectionName)) + 
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = NumLiveLowerDensity_modeled, ymax = NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled), width = 0.3) + # Add error bars
  # Add symbol for years with no data
    geom_point(
      data = subset(df_historic, !has_data),
      aes(x = as.factor(Year),
          y = ceiling(max(NumLiveStats_FIG_Historic$NumLiveMeanDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.5),
          group = SectionName),
          shape = 4,   # X shape
          size = 4,
          stroke = 1.3,
          color = "black",
          inherit.aes = FALSE
          ) +
      facet_wrap(~SectionName, nrow = 1) +
  
      scale_x_discrete("Year", 
                       expand = c(0.005, 0), 
                       guide = guide_axis(angle = -45)) +
      scale_y_continuous("Mean Oyster Density (per m2)", 
                         expand = c(0, 0),
                         limits = c(0, ceiling(max(NumLiveStats_FIG_Historic$NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE)) * 1.05),
                         breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 6)(c(0, ceiling(max(NumLiveStats_FIG_Historic$NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE))))) + 
      ggtitle("Modeled Mean Oyster Density on Historic Uncultched Reefs by Year and Section") + 
      BaseForm +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 0)) 

print(NumLiveStats_FIGURE_Historic)

### RESTORATION ###
## NFWF-2021 ##
# Needed for Null data symbol
df_nfwf2021 <- df_complete %>%
  filter(ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021" &
           Year > 2021 &
           SectionName != "West") %>%
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))

NumLiveStats_FIG_NFWF2021 <- NumLiveStats_ALL %>%
  filter(ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021") %>% # limits to NFWF-2021 only
    mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))

NumLiveStats_FIGURE_NFWF2021 <- NumLiveStats_FIG_NFWF2021 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(Year), 
             y = NumLiveMeanDensity_modeled,
             fill = SectionName)) + 
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = NumLiveLowerDensity_modeled, ymax = NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled), width = 0.3) + # Add error bars
  # Add symbol for years with no data
    geom_point(
      data = subset(df_nfwf2021, !has_data),
      aes(x = as.factor(Year),
          y = ceiling(max(NumLiveStats_FIG_NFWF2021$NumLiveMeanDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.5),
          group = SectionName),
          shape = 4,   # X shape
          size = 4,
          stroke = 1.3,
          color = "black",
          inherit.aes = FALSE
          ) +
      facet_wrap(~SectionName, nrow = 1) +
  
      scale_x_discrete("Year", 
                       expand = c(0.005, 0), 
                       guide = guide_axis(angle = -45)) +
      scale_y_continuous("Mean Oyster Density (per m2)", 
                         expand = c(0, 0),
                         limits = c(0, ceiling(max(NumLiveStats_FIG_NFWF2021$NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE)) * 1.05),
                         breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 6)(c(0, ceiling(max(NumLiveStats_FIG_NFWF2021$NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled, na.rm = TRUE))))) + 
      ggtitle("Modeled Mean Oyster Density on NFWF-2021 Reefs by Year and Section") + 
      BaseForm +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 0)) 

print(NumLiveStats_FIGURE_NFWF2021)

# Summary Table for the Appendix
NumLiveStats_TABLE <- NumLiveStats_ALL %>%
  select(ProjectGroup,
         Year,
         SectionName, 
         NumLiveDensityMean_raw,
         NumLiveDensitySD_raw,
         NumLiveMeanDensity_modeled,
         NumLiveLowerDensity_modeled,
         NumLiveUpperDensity_modeled) %>%
  arrange(ProjectGroup,
          SectionName,
          Year)
  
kable(NumLiveStats_TABLE,
      digits = 1,
      col.names = c("Project", "Year", "Section",
      "Raw Mean Density", "Raw SD",
      "Modeled Mean Density", "LCL 95%", "UCL 95%"),
      caption = "Raw and Modeled Mean Densities of Oysters. Density is expressed in number of oysters per square meter. SD = Standard Deviation. LCL = Lower Confidence Limit. UCL = Upper Confidence Limit. NA indicates that no samples were collected. ")

# Diagnostic Table for the Appendix
diag_NumLive_Historic <- extract_diagnostics(NumLive_Historic,  "Historic Uncultched")
diag_NumLive_NFWF2021 <- extract_diagnostics(NumLive_NFWF2021,  "NFWF-2021")

# Combine into a single Table
NumLive_Diagnostic_Table <- rbind(diag_NumLive_Historic, diag_NumLive_NFWF2021)
kable(NumLive_Diagnostic_Table)

```



``` {r Size Distribution Figures}
### Size Distributions

## Years past



SizeClasses_FIG <- ggplot(SizeClasses_ALL, 
                          aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = ProportionMeasured, fill = ShellHeightBin)) +
  geom_col(color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ ProjectGroup, ncol = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Shell Height Bin"
  ) +
  BaseForm +
  theme_bw()

SizeClasses_FIG





# Report Year
# Histograms

histogramY <- ggplot(ShellHeightsReportYrX, aes(x = ShellHeightBin, y = PercentMeasured, fill = ProjectGroup)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ ProjectGroup, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_discrete(
    breaks = levels(ShellHeightsReportYrX$ShellHeightBin)[seq(1, length(levels(ShellHeightsReportYrX$ShellHeightBin)), by = 3)]
  ) +
  labs(title = paste0("Shell Height Distribution of Oysters Measured During ", ReportYear, " Survey"), 
       x = "Shell Height (mm)", 
       y = "Percent of Measurements Within Groups")  +
  BaseForm +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

histogramY


```


``` {r NumLegalStats}
# Determine which stations have enough legal oysters to merit inclusion in the modeling process
# For this we will only include stations whose raw mean is greater than 1 legal oysters PER QUADRAT
QuadStatsLegal_List <- QuadStats %>% # Determine raw mean per quadrat 
  filter(Year == ReportYear) %>%
  group_by(FixedLocationID) %>%
  summarise(N = sum(!is.na(Num_Legal_76_plus)),
              Num_Legal_76_plus_Mean = mean(Num_Legal_76_plus, na.rm = TRUE)) 
QuadStatsLegal_NoModel <- QuadStatsLegal_List %>%
  filter(Num_Legal_76_plus_Mean < 2)
QuadStatsLegal_YesModel <- QuadStatsLegal_List %>%
  filter(Num_Legal_76_plus_Mean >= 2)
rm(QuadStatsLegal_List)

# Round Legal Number to a whole number
QuadStatsLegal <- QuadStats %>%
  filter(Year == ReportYear) %>%
  right_join(QuadStatsLegal_YesModel,
            by = c("FixedLocationID")) %>%
  mutate(NumLegal = round(Num_Legal_76_plus))

# Analysis indicates ......

# Figure out which data distribution to use
# Historic
hist(subset(QuadStatsLegal, ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")$NumLegal)
# NFWF-2021
hist(subset(QuadStatsLegal, ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")$NumLegal)

# FixedLocationID 0024
hist(subset(QuadStatsLegal, FixedLocationID == "0024")$NumLegal)
# FixedLocationID 0309
hist(subset(QuadStatsLegal, FixedLocationID == "0309")$NumLegal)
# FixedLocationID 0310
hist(subset(QuadStatsLegal, FixedLocationID == "0310")$NumLegal)
# FixedLocationID 0311
hist(subset(QuadStatsLegal, FixedLocationID == "0311")$NumLegal)
# data distributions appear similar between reefs

### Testing pooled vs. reef-specific means
# Model A (pooled)
m_pooled <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ 1,
                    family = nbinom2,
                    data = QuadStatsLegal)
# Model B (reef-specific means)
m_Reef_Specific <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ FixedLocationID,
                     family = nbinom2,
                     data = QuadStatsLegal)
# Model C (ProjectGroup-specific means)
m_Project_Specific <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ ProjectGroup,
                     family = nbinom2,
                     data = QuadStatsLegal)
# Compared
anova(m_pooled, m_Reef_Specific, m_Project_Specific)
#### Results indicate adding ProjectGroup massively improved model fit (ΔAIC = 11, p < 0.001). Adding reef-specific means marginally improved model fit and was not statistically significant (ΔAIC = 0.3, p = 0.12) Thus models for each ProjectGroup were used.


### Testing to see if each reef needs its own dispersion parameter
## Model with shared dispersion:
m1 <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ FixedLocationID,
              dispformula = ~1,
              family = nbinom2,
              data = QuadStatsLegal)
# Model with reef-specific dispersion:
m2 <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ FixedLocationID,
              dispformula = ~FixedLocationID,
              family = nbinom2,
              data = QuadStatsLegal)
# Model with ProjectGroup-specific dispersion:
m3 <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ ProjectGroup,
              dispformula = ~ProjectGroup,
              family = nbinom2,
              data = QuadStatsLegal)
# Compare:
anova(m1, m2, m3)
#### Results indicate adding reef-specific dispersion did not improve model fit (ΔAIC = -2.3, p = 0.35), and the difference was not statistically significant. Adding ProjectGroup dispersion found similar results (ΔAIC = -1.5, p = 0.054). Thus, no extra dispersion parameter will be used.


### Testing to see if zero inflation varies strongly among reef
## Without zero inflation:
m0 <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ FixedLocationID,
              ziformula = ~0,
              family = nbinom2,
              data = QuadStatsLegal)
# With zero inflation:
mzi <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ FixedLocationID,
               ziformula = ~1,
               family = nbinom2,
               data = QuadStatsLegal)
# Compare:
anova(m0, mzi)
#### Results indicate adding reef-specific zero inflation did not help fit and was not significant (p = 1)
#### Manual checking revealed that there are no zero values in NumLegal, thus zero-inflation shouldn't be necessary



### Historic
# Negative binomial out performed Poisson
NumLegal_Historic <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ 1,
              family = nbinom2,
              data = QuadStatsLegal,
              subset = ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(NumLegal_Historic, n = 1000, plot = T)



### NFWF-2021
# Negative binomial out performed Poisson
NumLegal_NFWF2021 <- glmmTMB(NumLegal ~ FixedLocationID,
              family = nbinom2,
              data = QuadStatsLegal,
              subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(NumLegal_NFWF2021, n = 1000, plot = T)






# Look at summaries
summary(NumLegal_Historic)
summary(NumLegal_NFWF2021)


# Create dataframe to store 
####### Put the modeled means into a data frame for plotting
NumLegalStats_historic <- emmeans(NumLegal_Historic, ~ 1, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "Historic Uncultched",
         "1" = "0024") %>%
  rename("FixedLocationID" = "1")

NumLegalStats_nfwf2021 <- emmeans(NumLegal_NFWF2021, ~ FixedLocationID, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "NFWF-2021")

NumLegalStats_modeled <- bind_rows(NumLegalStats_historic, NumLegalStats_nfwf2021) %>%
  rename(NumLegalMean_modeled = response,
         NumLegalLower_modeled = asymp.LCL,
         NumLegalUpper_modeled = asymp.UCL) %>%
  mutate(NumLegalMeanDensity_modeled = NumLegalMean_modeled * 4,
         NumLegalLowerDensity_modeled = NumLegalLower_modeled * 4,
         NumLegalUpperDensity_modeled = NumLegalUpper_modeled * 4) %>%
  select(-SE, -df, -ProjectGroup) %>%
  mutate(NumLegalUpperDensity_modeled = case_when(
    NumLegalMean_modeled <= 0 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NumLegalUpperDensity_modeled
  ))

# Generate raw mean and SD
NumLegalStats_RAW <- QuadStats %>%
  filter(Year == ReportYear) %>%
  group_by(FixedLocationID) %>%
  group_by(ProjectGroup, FixedLocationID) %>%
    summarise(N = sum(!is.na(Num_Legal_76_plus)),
              NumLegal_76plus_Mean_raw = mean(Num_Legal_76_plus, na.rm = TRUE),
              NumLegal_76_plus_SD_raw = sd(Num_Legal_76_plus, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    mutate(NumLegal_76plus_DensityMean_raw = NumLegal_76plus_Mean_raw * 4,
           NumLegal_76plus_DensitySD_raw = NumLegal_76_plus_SD_raw * 4) %>%
  arrange(FixedLocationID) %>%
  select(-matches("Live|Weight|Drill"))

NumLegalStats_ALL <- right_join(NumLegalStats_modeled, 
                              NumLegalStats_RAW, 
                              by = c("FixedLocationID")) %>%
  left_join(FixedLocations1,
            by = c("FixedLocationID")) %>%
  mutate(ParcelArea = case_when( # For parcels with no Area (Historic bars) assign area as 1 acre
    is.na(ParcelArea) ~ 1,
    TRUE ~ ParcelArea),
    LowerBagsPerAcre = (NumLegalLowerDensity_modeled * 4047) / 225,
    HarvestableBags = case_when( # Only reefs with LowerBags perAcre is >= 400 are harvestable
      LowerBagsPerAcre >= 400 ~ (LowerBagsPerAcre * ParcelArea) * 0.1,
      TRUE ~ NA))


```



``` {r NumLegalStats for Tables}

# Summary Table for Report
NumLegalStats_TABLE <- NumLegalStats_ALL %>%
  filter(!is.na(NumLegalMean_modeled)) %>%
  select(FixedLocationID, 
         ProjectGroup,
         StationNumber,
         StationNameNumber,
         ParcelArea,
         NumLegalLowerDensity_modeled,
         LowerBagsPerAcre, # Calculated from LCL 
         HarvestableBags) %>% # Estimated Harvestable Bags (10% of Total bags)
  arrange(ProjectGroup,
          StationNumber) %>%
  select(-StationNumber)

kable(NumLegalStats_TABLE,
      digits = 1,
      col.names = c("FixedLocationID", "Project", "Station Name", "Reef Acreage",
      "Modeled Mean Density (LCL 95%)", "Estimated Bags per Acre (LCL 95%)", "Estimated Harvestable Bags (LCL 95%)"),
      caption = "Modeled Mean Densities of legal-sized oysters (≥76 mm shell height) on reefs sampled in 2024. Density is expressed in number of legal-sized oysters per square meter. LCL = Lower Confidence Limit. NA indicates reef densities do not meet the required 400 bags per acre threshold for harvest. Reefs with a raw mean density at or below 8 legal-size oysters/m² (144 bags/acre) were not modeled. Raw and modeled mean densities for all reefs sampled available in Appendix A. ")

# Summary Table for the Appendix
NumLegalStats_TABLE_appendix <- NumLegalStats_ALL %>%
  select(FixedLocationID, 
         ProjectGroup,
         N,
         StationNumber,
         StationNameNumber,
         ParcelArea,
         NumLegal_76plus_DensityMean_raw,
         NumLegal_76plus_DensitySD_raw,
         NumLegalMeanDensity_modeled,
         NumLegalLowerDensity_modeled,
         NumLegalUpperDensity_modeled) %>%
  arrange(ProjectGroup,
          StationNumber) %>%
  select(-StationNumber)
  
kable(NumLegalStats_TABLE_appendix,
      digits = 1,
      col.names = c("FixedLocationID", "Project", "N", "Station Name", "Reef Acreage",
      "Raw Mean Density (Legal)", "Raw SD (Legal)",
      "Modeled Mean Density (Legal)", "LCL 95% (Legal)", "UCL 95% (Legal)"),
      caption = "Raw and Modeled Mean Densities of Legal-sized oysters on reefs sampled in 2024. Density is expressed in number of legal-sized oysters per square meter. N = Number of quadrats collected, SD = Standard deviation. LCL = Lower confidence limit. UCL = Upper confidence limit. NA indicates means were not modeled. Reefs with a raw mean density at or below 8 per square meter were not modeled. ")

# I may leave this out since r2() does not support models of class `glmmTMB` without random effects and from nbinom2-family with log-link-function.
# # Diagnostic Table for the Appendix
# diag_NumLegal_Historic <- extract_diagnostics(NumLegal_Historic,  "Historic Uncultched")
# diag_NumLegal_NFWF2021 <- extract_diagnostics(NumLegal_NFWF2021,  "NFWF-2021")
# 
# # Combine into a single Table
# NumLegal_Diagnostic_Table <- rbind(diag_NumLegal_Historic, diag_NumLegal_NFWF2021)
# kable(NumLegal_Diagnostic_Table)

```




``` {r NumLegalStats LCL calculations A, eval = FALSE}
### Looking at three ways to calculate the Lower Confidence level 95% for Legal densities

######
######
######
### A) emmeans → modeled mean per quadrat → multiply by n_quadrats

# model: m (glmmTMB); reef name variable: FixedLocationID
# choose reef(s) of interest

# emm_all <- emmeans(m, ~ FixedLocationID, type = "response")
# emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm_all)
LCL_calcs_A <- NumLegalStats_modeled %>%
  select(-LegalMeanDensity, -LegalLowerDensity, -LegalUpperDensity)

print(LCL_calcs_A)
######
######
######

```

```{r NumLegalStats LCL calculations B, eval = FALSE}
### B) Colin’s explicit parametric bootstrap (draw mean, simulate NB per quadrat)

#List of models we want to use for prediction and extrapolation.
modList <- list(NumLegal_Historic, NumLegal_NFWF2021, NumLegal_NFWF2021, NumLegal_NFWF2021)

#Add relevant model estimates to extrapDat. I just copied these from summary() as they are all nbinom and no zero-inflation
extrapDat <- data.frame(LCL_calcs_A, 
                        meanLog = c(2.6626, 3.4078, 3.1724, 3.0788), 
                        meanLogSE = c(0.1431, 0.1069, 0.1532, 0.1540), 
                        disp = c(4.21, 7.22, 7.22, 7.22),
                        N = 15)


#Final data frame called extrapDat2 is all set up for bootstrapping and to stor results

extrapDat2 <- extrapDat %>% mutate(`Mean Total` = NA, `L95 Total` = NA, `U95 Total` = NA)

nSims <- 1000
#REady to bootstrap
# had to remove nested if loops
for (j in 1:nrow(extrapDat2)){
  totalCount <- NULL
  extrapolated <- NULL
  for (i in 1:nSims){
        extrapolated[i] <- sum(rnbinom(n = 1, 
                                       mu = exp(rnorm(1, 
                                                      mean = extrapDat2$meanLog[j], 
                                                      sd = extrapDat2$meanLogSE[j])), 
                                       size = extrapDat2$disp[j]))
    
     
    totalCount <- c(totalCount, extrapolated[i])
  }
  extrapDat2$`Mean Total`[j] <- mean(totalCount)
  extrapDat2$`L95 Total`[j] <- quantile(totalCount, 0.025)
  extrapDat2$`U95 Total`[j] <- quantile(totalCount, 0.975)

}

print(extrapDat2)
```

``` {r NumLegalStats LCL calculations C historic, eval = FALSE}
###C) Recommended: Model-based parametric bootstrap using simulate() (glmmTMB)

# Build newdata that lists each quadrat/unit to be summed across reef
# If you have actual quadrat rows, use them (one row per quadrat).
# If you only know the number of quadrats per reef, create that many rows per reef.
make_quadrat_df <- function(reef_id, n_quads) {
  data.frame(
    FixedLocationID = factor(rep(reef_id, n_quads)),
    # include other covariates used in the model (Year, ProjectGroup, etc.)
    #Year = NA,     # fill with relevant Year if model uses Year (or set to target Year)
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Example: create newdata for all reefs
nd <- bind_rows(
  make_quadrat_df("0024", 15)
)

# IMPORTANT: newdata must have all predictors used in model. If model has Year or other covariates,
# you should fill them appropriately (e.g., Year = 2024, etc.)
# Also ensure factor levels match model's levels.

# Simulate responses:
set.seed(14)
nsim <- 1000
sims <- simulate(NumLegal_Historic, nsim = nsim, newdata = nd)

# sims is a list (or matrix) of simulated response vectors; each column is a replicate
# For glmmTMB, simulate returns a list of nsim vectors.
# Convert to matrix for aggregation:
sims_mat <- do.call(cbind, sims)     # rows = quadrats in nd, cols = sims

# Add FixedLocationID to nd for aggregation
nd$FixedLocationID <- factor(nd$FixedLocationID, levels = levels(nd$FixedLocationID))

# For each simulation replicate, sum by reef
library(matrixStats)
reef_ids <- unique(nd$FixedLocationID)
mean_by_reef <- sapply(seq_len(nsim), function(i) {
  tapply(sims_mat[, i], nd$FixedLocationID, mean)
})
# mean_by_reef is matrix (rows = reefs, cols = sims)
# Convert to tidy table
mean_by_reef_df <- data.frame(
  simulation = seq_along(mean_by_reef),
  FixedLocationID = names(mean_by_reef),
  mean = as.numeric(mean_by_reef)
)

#colnames(mean_by_reef_df) <- as.character(reef_ids)  # replicate-wise columns: each col a reef? adjust orientation

# Compute stats per reef:
library(tidyr)
# mean_by_reef_long <- as.data.frame(mean_by_reef) %>%
#   # rows are reefs, columns sims; we'll compute quantiles
#   rownames_to_column("FixedLocationID") %>%
#   pivot_longer(-FixedLocationID, names_to = "sim", values_to = "total")

summary_table <- mean_by_reef_df %>%
  group_by(FixedLocationID) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_total = mean(mean),
    lcl_total = quantile(mean, 0.025),
    ucl_total = quantile(mean, 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_table

```


``` {r NumLegalStats LCL calculations Restoration, eval = FALSE}
###########################
###########################
###########################
# Lazy version of code above, adjusted for Restoration
###C) Recommended: Model-based parametric bootstrap using simulate() (glmmTMB)

# Build newdata that lists each quadrat/unit to be summed across reef
# If you have actual quadrat rows, use them (one row per quadrat).
# If you only know the number of quadrats per reef, create that many rows per reef.
make_quadrat_df <- function(reef_id, n_quads) {
  data.frame(
    FixedLocationID = factor(rep(reef_id, n_quads)),
    # include other covariates used in the model (Year, ProjectGroup, etc.)
    #Year = NA,     # fill with relevant Year if model uses Year (or set to target Year)
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Example: create newdata for all reefs
nd <- bind_rows(
  make_quadrat_df("0309", 15),
  make_quadrat_df("0310", 15),
  make_quadrat_df("0311", 15)
)

# IMPORTANT: newdata must have all predictors used in model. If model has Year or other covariates,
# you should fill them appropriately (e.g., Year = 2024, etc.)
# Also ensure factor levels match model's levels.

# Simulate responses:
set.seed(14)
nsim <- 1000
sims <- simulate(NumLegal_NFWF2021, nsim = nsim, newdata = nd)

# sims is a list (or matrix) of simulated response vectors; each column is a replicate
# For glmmTMB, simulate returns a list of nsim vectors.
# Convert to matrix for aggregation:
sims_mat <- do.call(cbind, sims)     # rows = quadrats in nd, cols = sims

# Add FixedLocationID to nd for aggregation
nd$FixedLocationID <- factor(nd$FixedLocationID, levels = levels(nd$FixedLocationID))

# For each simulation replicate, sum by reef
library(matrixStats)
reef_ids <- unique(nd$FixedLocationID)
mean_by_reef <- sapply(seq_len(nsim), function(i) {
  tapply(sims_mat[, i], nd$FixedLocationID, mean)
})
# mean_by_reef is matrix (rows = reefs, cols = sims)
# Convert to tidy table
sum_by_reef_df <- as.data.frame(t(sum_by_reef))
colnames(sum_by_reef_df) <- as.character(reef_ids)  # replicate-wise columns: each col a reef? adjust orientation


# Compute stats per reef:
library(tidyr)
mean_by_reef_long <- as.data.frame(mean_by_reef) %>%
  # rows are reefs, columns sims; we'll compute quantiles
  rownames_to_column("FixedLocationID") %>%
  pivot_longer(-FixedLocationID, names_to = "sim", values_to = "mean")

summary_table <- mean_by_reef_long %>%
  group_by(FixedLocationID) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_total = mean(mean),
    lcl_total = quantile(mean, 0.025),
    ucl_total = quantile(mean, 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_table

```



``` {r NumLegalStats LCL calculations vC2, eval = FALSE}

###############################################
###############################################
###############################################
##### C v2 using chatGPT to make the above code work for multiple reefs and multiple models

# 1. Store your reef IDs
reef_ids <- c("0024", "0309", "0310", "0311")

# 2. Store each model in a named list
models <- list(
  "0024" = NumLive_Historic,
  "0309" = NumLegal_NFWF2021,
  "0310" = NumLegal_NFWF2021,
  "0311" = NumLegal_NFWF2021
)

# 3. Function to build newdata for a single reef
make_quadrat_df <- function(reef_id, n_quads) {
  data.frame(
    FixedLocationID = factor(rep(reef_id, n_quads)),
    # Include all covariates the model uses!
    # Example (if model has Year):
    # Year = 2024,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# 4. Number of simulations per reef
nsim <- 1000
set.seed(14)

# 5. Loop over reefs and simulate
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

results <- map_dfr(reef_ids, function(reef) {

  mod <- models[[reef]]
  n_quads <- 15  # Insert real number of quadrats for that reef

  # Build newdata for this reef
  nd <- make_quadrat_df(reef, n_quads)

  # Make sure factor levels match model
  nd$FixedLocationID <- factor(nd$FixedLocationID,
                               levels = mod$frame$FixedLocationID |> levels())

  # Simulate
  sims_mat <- simulate(mod, nsim = nsim, newdata = nd)
  sims_mat <- as.matrix(sims_mat)

  # Compute reef-wide means for each simulation
  mean_by_sim <- colMeans(sims_mat)

  # Return a tidy data frame
  tibble(
    reef_id = reef,
    simulation = 1:nsim,
    mean = mean_by_sim
  )
})


mean_by_reef_df <- as.data.frame(results)

# Compute stats per reef:
library(tidyr)
mean_by_reef_long <- as.data.frame(mean_by_reef) %>%
  # rows are reefs, columns sims; we'll compute quantiles
  rownames_to_column("FixedLocationID") %>%
  pivot_longer(-FixedLocationID, names_to = "sim", values_to = "total")

summary_table <- mean_by_reef_df %>%
  group_by(reef_id) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_total = mean(mean),
    lcl_total = quantile(mean, 0.025),
    ucl_total = quantile(mean, 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_table

```






``` {Survey Text}
### Placeholder for Survey text for report
```
This is text to output for Survey
